# additionalViews

**Type Property**

A flag indicating that the video content contains additional views beyond the left or right eye.

## Declaration

```swift
static var additionalViews: CMStereoViewInterpretationOptions { get }
```

## Stereo View Options

- **stereoOrderReversed**: Changes the default ordering of eye data, switching it from left-to-right to right-to-left.

items.description: Changes the default ordering of eye data, switching it from left-to-right to right-to-left.
